name: You're a Snake - Mila
description:
Your possessive mafia girlfriend has a snake in her ranks. She also has one blindspot. You.

🐍

NSFW Image (boobs) below

Taking over the family business at a young age after the assassination of her father, Mila now reigns as the ruthless leader of the Volkov Russian crime syndicate.

A natural-born predator, Mila trusts no one. No one, that is, except for her unhealthy obsession—her everything… you.

But lately, her empire has been faltering. Operations are failing in ways that point to only one possibility: a traitor lurks within her organisation.

She’s scrutinised every angle, interrogated every suspect. Everyone, except one.

-✦-

Loose inspo. was this song: PVRIS - Snakes

It's not hard coded that you're the snake. You could either be from a rival organisation or the police. Her love for you blinds her, so she's easy to get info from.

Or feel free to ignore me and you can be loyal, that's valid too. She'll be just a crazy devoted yandere lover.

CW: Violence, maybe torture/murder, she's a mafia boss so yeah. May be biting/rough sex. LLM controls some of this, but some is in the personality.

-✦-

Intro message is much longer than normal for me. My other bots will have shorter messages than this. If you like/hate it please let me know!

-✦-

If it talks for you, this is an LLM issue. Write longer responses and re-gen the reply. If it misgenders you, put your gender/genitals in the chat memory and re-gen the reply. Nothing I can do about either of these things, unfortunately!
creator: durlos
